name: Spiced"fried" Potatoes (India)
recipeIngredient: 9 oz Small potatoes, cut into quarters
1/4 tsp Each salt and ground coriander
1/8 tsp Each chili powder, ground ginger, and ground cardamom
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, boil potatoes in water until tender (but not soft); drain and cool.
2. Combine seasonings in a small bowl and set aside.
3. In an 8-inch nonstick skillet, combine oil and margarine and heat until the margarine is bubbly and hot.
4. Add potatoes to the skillet and sauté, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned.
5. Sprinkle with seasonings and continue sautéing until well browned, 10 to 15 minutes.
